hero.label: Together We Achieve More
hero.title: Our Partners
hero.subtitle: RAPP's work is made possible by a network of committed local and international partners who share our vision for a peaceful, prosperous Rwanda.

partners.name: European Union Delegation
partners.desc: Funding democratic governance and rural development.

partners.name: Rwanda Development Board
partners.desc: Aligning programmes with national development priorities.

partners.name: Imbuto Foundation
partners.desc: Joint youth and women empowerment initiatives.

partners.name: University of Rwanda
partners.desc: Research on conflict resolution and sustainable development.

partners.name: Carnegie Mellon University Africa
partners.desc: Technology and innovation for social impact.

partners.name: Indego Africa
partners.desc: Empowers women to bring their families out of poverty through trade partnerships with artisans in Rwanda. Sells contemporary accessories and home décor to retailers in the United States, returning all profits to training in financial management, technology, and literacy.

partners.name: Root Capital
partners.desc: Provides a voice for small grassroots farmers through a lending model for rural communities in Africa and Latin America who are unable to find help otherwise, enabling them to lead themselves out of poverty.

partners.name: Aid to Artisans
partners.desc: Provides help to artisan groups in at-risk communities worldwide, mentoring local groups in three areas: business skills training, market access, and product development.

partners.name: CHF International
partners.desc: A non-profit working through USAID that helps establish affordable housing internationally and works in Rwanda on HIV prevention and education, among other community development activities.

partners.name: Global Youth Connect
partners.desc: A US-based non-profit whose mission is to empower youth to advance human rights. Sends delegations from North America to Rwanda each year to partner with local Rwandan youth and NGOs, working closely with RAPP.

howToPartner.title: Corporate Partnership
howToPartner.desc: Align your CSR goals with impactful community programmes in Rwanda.

howToPartner.title: Government Collaboration
howToPartner.desc: Co-design policies and programmes that advance peace and progress.

howToPartner.title: Academic Partnership
howToPartner.desc: Conduct joint research and share knowledge for evidence-based programming.

howToPartner.title: NGO Alliance
howToPartner.desc: Pool resources and expertise to maximize collective impact.
